vllm.title: [Kernel] Support running GPTQ 8-bit models in Marlin
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds 8-bit weight support to the Marlin GPU kernel and the Marlin on-the-fly repack. As a result, all GPTQ 8-bit models (with any group size or act_order) can run via Marlin (for Ampere GPUs and up).

vllm.title: [mypy][7/N] Cover all directories
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR covers all directories.
Note that we still have 200+ errors if we run mypy vllm/, I think because it enables across directory checking. This will be handled in the next PR (which will be the last PR for mypy).

vllm.title: [Misc] Exclude the `tests` directory from being packaged
vllm.author: itechbear
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
When the vLLM pypi package is built, it would include some files under the tests directory. When users install it via the pip install command, the tests directory is also installed on the system.
The existing build rules already exclude the tests directory by excluding it in the find_package

vllm.title: [BugFix] Include target-device specific requirements.txt in sdist
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These are all referenced in setup.py, so they could all be needed for users of the sdist.
It's tempting to include requirements-*.txt but requirements-build.txt and requirements-dev.txt should not be in the sdist.

vllm.title: [Misc] centralize all usage of environment variables
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
An implementation of RFC #4407 .
Exceptions are:

Test code related environment variables, leave as they are
Modify/write to environment variables,  leave as they are
environment variables used in setup.py, when we cannot import vllm/envs.py . leave as they are

vllm.title: [kernel] fix sliding window in prefix prefill Triton kernel
vllm.author: mmoskal
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This adds support for the sliding window in prefix prefill kernel.
I had to use a large negative value instead of -inf for masking, since otherwise in some situations we get '-inf - -inf' in softmax which leads to NaNs.
Added tests comparing with xformers.
Also added a bunch of comments with tensor

vllm.title: [CI/Build] AMD CI pipeline with extended set of tests.
vllm.author: Alexei-V-Ivanov-AMD
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Extending the set of tests that are running on the AMD hardware.

vllm.title: [Core] Ignore infeasible swap requests.
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, when a request is swapped out, and if it is infeasible because we don't have enough kv caches to schedule the sequence, it hangs forever. We already handle this case correctly for preemption case using AllocStatus.NEVER. We are using the same mechanism to ignore swapped out requests that

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] enable allreduce for multiple tp groups
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prior PR #4512 adds support for multiple tp groups, in pynccl.
This PR further enables it for the allreduce operation used in tp.
Part of ongoing effort to support pp in #4412 .

vllm.title: [BugFix] Prevent the task of `_force_log` from being garbage collected
vllm.author: Atry
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The task returned by asyncio.create_task should not be discarded. See python/cpython#88831
